title: Prevision Or Provision.
content:
That prince takes soon enough the victor's room
    Who first provides not to be overcome.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Prevision Or Provision.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
